name: Rich Chocolate Pumpkin Truffles
recipeInstructions:
Note: Apple juice may be substituted for coffee liqueur if desired.
In a medium bowl, combine vanilla wafer crumbs, ground almonds, the 1/2 cup powdered sugar, and cinnamon. Blend in chocolate, pumpkin, and coffee liqueur. Form into 1-inch balls. Chill. Dust with remaining powdered sugar just before serving.
